ogTitle: Corunna Station vs Coulta: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Corunna Station and Coulta.
heading: Corunna Station vs Coulta — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Corunna Station, South Australia and Coulta, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Corunna Station has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Coulta (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Corunna Station or Coulta safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Corunna Station has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Coulta scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Corunna Station scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Coulta scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Corunna Station or Coulta?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Corunna Station has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
